cCompo = Alias()

If crSigCdPam.AutComps <> 1
	Select &cCompo.
	Scan
		Select crSigCdCom
		Go Top In crSigCdCom

		If !Eof([crSigCdCom])
			lcQuery = [Select a.cUnis, a.cUnips, b.BPesos ] + ;
					  [From SigCdPro a, SigCdGrp b ] + ;
					  [Where a.CPros = '] + &cCompo..Mats + [' And ] + ;
